creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 232969
v2

Remove --with-iconv; configure picks up the correct headers and libraries in all USES=iconv cases. The corresponding .pc and xml2-config bits are also obviated.

On a build system with iconv built into libc:

$ xml2-config --cflags
-I/usr/local/include/libxml2

$ cat /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/libxml-2.0.pc
prefix=/usr/local
exec_prefix=${prefix}
libdir=${exec_prefix}/lib
includedir=${prefix}/include
modules=1

Name: libXML
Version: 2.9.13
Description: libXML library version2.
Requires:
Libs: -L${libdir} -lxml2
Libs.private: -licui18n -L/usr/local/lib -licuuc -licudata   -lz  -L/usr/lib -llzma  -lm  -L/usr/local/lib
Cflags: -I${includedir}/libxml2

Still investigating possible downstream pollution with ICU.
